title: Police shine at provincial excellence awards
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Police were...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Police were recognised for their achievements at the annual Provincial Prestige Excellence Awards 2024/25 held at the Century City Conference Centre in Cape Town on Saturday 17 January.


> The Western Cape comprises 151 police stations, and George stood out with several accolades:


• Constable Alshandre Louw - second runner-up, man of the year

• Sergeant Charl Botha - sportman of the year

• Warrant Officer Wendy Lee - woman of the year

• Captain Deon Floris - second runner-up, sportman of the year

The awards celebrate the dedication, skill and hard work of the local police and community members across the province.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
